name: Bob Buckner

contactInfo.office: 2111 S. John Redditt Dr., Lufkin, TX 75904

bio: Bob Buckner serves as the Angelina County Sheriff, leading law enforcement operations throughout the county from the office in Lufkin. Sheriff Buckner is committed to protecting the citizens of Angelina County through proactive policing and strong community relationships.
campaignPromises: Combat the opioid and methamphetamine crisis in Angelina County
Recruit and retain qualified deputies with competitive pay
Expand the K-9 unit for narcotics detection
Improve response times in rural parts of the county
